ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mixtures" (
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mixture */,
  "mixture_name" TEXT /* Name of the mixture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mixture and its components */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Detailed composition of the mixture */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the mixture was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the mixture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mixture is currently active for use in experiments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mixtures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immune_cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immune cell type */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of immune cell (e.g., B cell, T cell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the immune cell type and its role */,
  "cell_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the immune cell (e.g., human, mouse) */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Specific cell line used */,
  "is_primary_cell" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cell is a primary cell or a cell line */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the cell type information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mixture used in the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value indicating significance of results */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation coefficient of the results */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error of the predictive model */,
  "absolute_score" REAL /* Absolute score of significance */,
  "experiment_title" TEXT /* Title of the experiment */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used in the experiment */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of publication (e.g., in review, published) */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experiment is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES mixtures ("mixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "immune_cell_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each immune cell response */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the immune cell type */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Response value indicating the level of immune response */,
  "response_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the response value */,
  "time_point" TEXT /* Time point at which the response was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the response */,
  "is_control" INTEGER /* Indicates if the response is from a control sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immune_cell_responses_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES immune_cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_immune_cell_responses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Primary research area of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the institution */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the researcher logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_analysis" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "correlation_coefficient" REAL /* Correlation coefficient result */,
  "significance_level" TEXT /* Significance level of the correlation */,
  "correlation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the correlation */,
  "correlation_matrix" TEXT /* Matrix of correlation values */,
  "is_significant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the correlation is statistically significant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rmse_analysis" (
  "rmse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RMSE analysis result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "rmse_value" REAL /* Calculated RMSE value */,
  "rmse_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the RMSE */,
  "rmse_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the RMSE calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rmse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rmse_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absolute_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absolute score record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Absolute score value indicating significance */,
  "score_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the absolute score */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the score calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absolute_scores_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
